<path>/Users/hobo/Projects/AgentLog/packages/backend/src/routes/handoff.ts</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: /**
2:  * @agentlog/backend — Handoff 路由
3:  *
4:  * 提供 Trace 交接相关 API：
5:  * - GET /api/traces/pending - 查询待认领 traces
6:  * - POST /api/traces/:id/handoff - 创建 pending_handoff trace
7:  * - POST /api/traces/:id/resume - Agent 认领 trace
8:  * - POST /api/traces/:id/pause - 暂停 trace
9:  * - POST /api/traces/:id/resume-from-pause - 从暂停恢复
10:  * - POST /api/traces/:id/complete - 标记完成
11:  * - GET /api/sessions/active - 获取当前 active session
12:  */
13: 
14: import type { FastifyInstance, FastifyRequest, FastifyReply } from "fastify";
15: import {
16:   getTraceById,
17:   updateTrace,
18:   queryTraces,
19:   transitionToHandoff,
20:   transitionToInProgress,
21:   transitionToCompleted,
22:   transitionToPaused,
23:   transitionFromPaused,
24:   type Trace,
25: } from "../services/traceService.js";
26: import {
27:   createPendingTrace,
28:   claimPendingTrace,
29:   completeActiveSession,
30:   getPendingTraces,
31:   getActiveSession,
32:   readSessionsJsonByWorkspace,
33: } from "../services/sessionsJsonService.js";
34: 
35: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
36: // 类型定义
37: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
38: 
39: interface TraceParams {
40:   id: string;
41: }
42: 
43: interface HandoffBody {
44:   targetAgent: string;
45:   taskGoal?: string;
46:   workspacePath?: string;
47: }
48: 
49: interface ResumeBody {
50:   agentType: string;
51:   workspacePath?: string;
52: }
53: 
54: interface PauseResumeParams {
55:   id: string;
56: }
57: 
58: interface ActiveSessionQuery {
59:   workspacePath: string;
60: }
61: 
62: interface PendingTracesQuery {
63:   workspacePath: string;
64:   agentType?: string;
65: }
66: 
67: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
68: // 辅助函数
69: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
70: 
71: function getWorkspacePath(body: { workspacePath?: string }, workspaceHeader?: string): string {
72:   return body.workspacePath ?? workspaceHeader ?? process.cwd() ?? "";
73: }
74: 
75: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
76: // 路由
77: // ─────────────────────────────────────────────
78: 
79: async function handoffRoutes(app: FastifyInstance): Promise<void> {
80:   /**
81:    * GET /api/traces/pending
82:    * 查询待认领的 traces
83:    */
84:   app.get<{ Querystring: PendingTracesQuery }>(
85:     "/pending",
86:     {
87:       schema: {
88:         querystring: {
89:           type: "object",
90:           required: ["workspacePath"],
91:           properties: {
92:             workspacePath: { type: "string" },
93:             agentType: { type: "string" },
94:           },
95:         },
96:       },
97:     },
98:     async (req: FastifyRequest<{ Querystring: PendingTracesQuery }>, reply: FastifyReply) => {
99:       const { workspacePath, agentType } = req.query;
100: 
101:       const pendingList = await getPendingTraces(workspacePath, agentType);
102: 
103:       return reply.send({
104:         success: true,
105:         data: pendingList,
106:         total: pendingList.length,
107:       });
108:     }
109:   );
110: 
111:   /**
112:    * POST /api/traces/:id/handoff
113:    * 创建 pending_handoff trace
114:    */
115:   app.post<{ Params: TraceParams; Body: HandoffBody }>(
116:     "/:id/handoff",
117:     {
118:       schema: {
119:         params: {
120:           type: "object",
121:           required: ["id"],
122:           properties: {
123:             id: { type: "string", minLength: 1 },
124:           },
125:         },
126:         body: {
127:           type: "object",
128:           required: ["targetAgent"],
129:           properties: {
130:             targetAgent: { type: "string" },
131:             taskGoal: { type: "string" },
132:             workspacePath: { type: "string" },
133:           },
134:         },
135:       },
136:     },
137:     async (req: FastifyRequest<{ Params: TraceParams; Body: HandoffBody }>, reply: FastifyReply) => {
138:       const traceId = req.params.id;
139:       const { targetAgent, taskGoal, workspacePath } = req.body;
140: 
141:       const trace = getTraceById(traceId);
142:       if (!trace) {
143:         return reply.status(404).send({
144:           success: false,
145:           error: "Trace not found",
146:         });
147:       }
148: 
149:       const wsPath = workspacePath ?? trace.workspacePath ?? process.cwd() ?? "";
150: 
151:       // 检查是否已有分配给相同 agent 的 pending trace
152:       const existingPending = await getPendingTraces(wsPath, targetAgent);
153:       if (existingPending.length > 0) {
154:         return reply.status(409).send({
155:           success: false,
156:           error: `当前工作区已有一个待认领的 Trace（${existingPending[0].traceId}）分配给 ${targetAgent}，请切换到其他 Git Worktree 再进行交接。`,
157:           existingPendingTraceId: existingPending[0].traceId,
158:         });
159:       }
160: 
161:       // 1. 更新 trace 状态为 pending_handoff
162:       const updatedTrace = transitionToHandoff(traceId, targetAgent, wsPath);
163:       if (!updatedTrace) {
164:         return reply.status(400).send({
165:           success: false,
166:           error: "Failed to transition to pending_handoff",
167:         });
168:       }
169: 
170:       // 2. 创建 pending trace 条目（带上当前 worktree 标识）
171:       const entry = await createPendingTrace(wsPath, traceId, targetAgent, taskGoal ?? trace.taskGoal, wsPath);
172: 
173:       return reply.send({
174:         success: true,
175:         data: {
176:           trace: updatedTrace,
177:           pendingEntry: entry,
178:         },
179:       });
180:     }
181:   );
182: 
183:   /**
184:    * POST /api/traces/:id/resume
185:    * Agent 认领 trace
186:    */
187:   app.post<{ Params: TraceParams; Body: ResumeBody }>(
188:     "/:id/resume",
189:     {
190:       schema: {
191:         params: {
192:           type: "object",
193:           required: ["id"],
194:           properties: {
195:             id: { type: "string", minLength: 1 },
196:           },
197:         },
198:         body: {
199:           type: "object",
200:           required: ["agentType"],
201:           properties: {
202:             agentType: { type: "string" },
203:             workspacePath: { type: "string" },
204:           },
205:         },
206:       },
207:     },
208:     async (req: FastifyRequest<{ Params: TraceParams; Body: ResumeBody }>, reply: FastifyReply) => {
209:       const traceId = req.params.id;
210:       const { agentType, workspacePath } = req.body;
211: 
212:       const trace = getTraceById(traceId);
213:       if (!trace) {
214:         return reply.status(404).send({
215:           success: false,
216:           error: "Trace not found",
217:         });
218:       }
219: 
220:       const wsPath = workspacePath ?? trace.workspacePath ?? process.cwd() ?? "";
221: 
222:       // 1. 认领 pending trace（从 sessions.json）
223:       const activeSession = await claimPendingTrace(wsPath, traceId, agentType);
224:       if (!activeSession) {
225:         return reply.status(400).send({
226:           success: false,
227:           error: "Failed to claim pending trace. Trace may not be in pending state.",
228:         });
229:       }
230: 
231:       // 2. 更新 trace 状态为 in_progress
232:       const updatedTrace = transitionToInProgress(traceId);
233: 
234:       return reply.send({
235:         success: true,
236:         data: {
237:           trace: updatedTrace,
238:           activeSession,
239:         },
240:       });
241:     }
242:   );
243: 
244:   /**
245:    * POST /api/traces/:id/pause
246:    * 暂停 trace（用户主动暂停）
247:    */
248:   app.post<{ Params: PauseResumeParams }>(
249:     "/:id/pause",
250:     {
251:       schema: {
252:         params: {
253:           type: "object",
254:           required: ["id"],
255:           properties: {
256:             id: { type: "string", minLength: 1 },
257:           },
258:         },
259:       },
260:     },
261:     async (req: FastifyRequest<{ Params: PauseResumeParams }>, reply: FastifyReply) => {
262:       const traceId = req.params.id;
263: 
264:       const trace = getTraceById(traceId);
265:       if (!trace) {
266:         return reply.status(404).send({
267:           success: false,
268:           error: "Trace not found",
269:         });
270:       }
271: 
272:       const updatedTrace = transitionToPaused(traceId);
273:       if (!updatedTrace) {
274:         return reply.status(400).send({
275:           success: false,
276:           error: "Cannot pause trace in current state",
277:         });
278:       }
279: 
280:       return reply.send({
281:         success: true,
282:         data: updatedTrace,
283:       });
284:     }
285:   );
286: 
287:   /**
288:    * POST /api/traces/:id/resume-from-pause
289:    * 从暂停状态恢复
290:    */
291:   app.post<{ Params: PauseResumeParams }>(
292:     "/:id/resume-from-pause",
293:     {
294:       schema: {
295:         params: {
296:           type: "object",
297:           required: ["id"],
298:           properties: {
299:             id: { type: "string", minLength: 1 },
300:           },
301:         },
302:       },
303:     },
304:     async (req: FastifyRequest<{ Params: PauseResumeParams }>, reply: FastifyReply) => {
305:       const traceId = req.params.id;
306: 
307:       const trace = getTraceById(traceId);
308:       if (!trace) {
309:         return reply.status(404).send({
310:           success: false,
311:           error: "Trace not found",
312:         });
313:       }
314: 
315:       const updatedTrace = transitionFromPaused(traceId);
316:       if (!updatedTrace) {
317:         return reply.status(400).send({
318:           success: false,
319:           error: "Cannot resume trace from current state",
320:         });
321:       }
322: 
323:       return reply.send({
324:         success: true,
325:         data: updatedTrace,
326:       });
327:     }
328:   );
329: 
330:   /**

metadata.preview:
/**
 * @agentlog/backend — Handoff 路由
 *
 * 提供 Trace 交接相关 API：
 * - GET /api/traces/pending - 查询待认领 traces
 * - POST /api/traces/:id/handoff - 创建 pending_handoff trace
 * - POST /api/traces/:id/resume - Agent 认领 trace
 * - POST /api/traces/:id/pause - 暂停 trace
 * - POST /api/traces/:id/resume-from-pause - 从暂停恢复
 * - POST /api/traces/:id/complete - 标记完成
 * - GET /api/sessions/active - 获取当前 active session
 */

import type { FastifyInstance, FastifyRequest, FastifyReply } from "fastify";
import {
  getTraceById,
  updateTrace,
  queryTraces,
  transitionToHandoff,
  transitionToInProgress,

701:   return updated;
702: }
703: 
704: /**
705:  * 将 trace 转为 paused 状态。
706:  * 用于用户主动暂停的场景。
707:  */
708: export function transitionToPaused(traceId: string): Trace | null {
709:   const trace = getTraceById(traceId);
710:   if (!trace) {
711:     return null;
712:   }
713: 
714:   if (trace.status !== 'running' && trace.status !== 'in_progress') {
715:     return null;
716:   }
717: 
718:   const updated = updateTrace(traceId, { status: 'paused' });
719:   console.log(`[traceService] transitionToPaused: ${traceId}`);
720:   return updated;
721: }
722: 
723: /**
724:  * 从 paused 状态恢复为 running。
725:  */
726: export function transitionFromPaused(traceId: string): Trace | null {
727:   const trace = getTraceById(traceId);
728:   if (!trace || trace.status !== 'paused') {
729:     return null;
730:   }
731: 
732:   const updated = updateTrace(traceId, { status: 'running' });
733:   console.log(`[traceService] transitionFromPaused: ${traceId} -> running`);
734:   return updated;
735: }

(End of file - total 735 lines)
</content>

141: export function createTrace(req: CreateTraceRequest): Trace {
142:   const db = getDatabase();
143:   const id = ulid();
144:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
145:   const status = req.status ?? 'running';
146:   const parentTraceId = req.parentTraceId ?? null;
147: 
148:   db.prepare(`
149:     INSERT INTO traces (id, parent_trace_id, task_goal, status, workspace_path, affected_files, created_at, updated_at)
150:     VALUES (@id, @parent_trace_id, @task_goal, @status, @workspace_path, @affected_files, @created_at, @updated_at)
151:   `).run({
152:     id,
153:     parent_trace_id: parentTraceId,
154:     task_goal: req.taskGoal,
155:     status,
156:     workspace_path: req.workspacePath ?? null,
157:     affected_files: '[]',
158:     created_at: now,
159:     updated_at: now,
160:   });
161: 
162:   const created = getTraceById(id);
163:   if (!created) {
164:     throw new Error(`[traceService] Trace 创建失败，id=${id}`);
165:   }
166:   return created;
167: }
168: 
169: export function getTraceById(id: string): Trace | null {
170:   const db = getDatabase();
171:   const row = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM traces WHERE id = ?').get(id) as TraceRow | undefined;
172:   return row ? rowToTrace(row) : null;
173: }
174: 
175: export function updateTrace(id: string, req: UpdateTraceRequest): Trace | null {
176:   const db = getDatabase();
177:   const existing = getTraceById(id);
178:   if (!existing) {
179:     return null;
180:   }
181: 
182:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
183:   const taskGoal = req.taskGoal ?? existing.taskGoal;
184:   const status = req.status ?? existing.status;
185: 
186:   // Merge affected_files: union of existing and new, deduplicated
187:   const mergedFiles = req.affectedFiles !== undefined
188:     ? [...new Set([...existing.affectedFiles, ...req.affectedFiles])]
189:     : existing.affectedFiles;
190: 
191:   db.prepare(`
192:     UPDATE traces SET task_goal = @task_goal, status = @status, affected_files = @affected_files, updated_at = @updated_at
193:     WHERE id = @id
194:   `).run({
195:     id,
196:     task_goal: taskGoal,
197:     status,
198:     affected_files: toJson(mergedFiles),
199:     updated_at: now,
200:   });
201: 
202:   return getTraceById(id);
203: }
204: 
205: export function deleteTrace(id: string): boolean {
206:   const db = getDatabase();
207:   const result = db.prepare('DELETE FROM traces WHERE id = ?').run(id);
208:   return result.changes > 0;
209: }

217:   workspacePath?: string;
218: } = {}): { data: Trace[]; total: number; page: number; pageSize: number } {
